name: Tian Teck Land Limited
summary: Tian Teck Land Limited, an investment holding company, engages in the property investment activities in the People's Republic of China and Hong Kong. As of March 31, 2020, its investment properties include iSQUARE complex in Tsim Sha Tsui; various units of Good Luck Industrial Building; a floor of Euro Trade Centre; various units of an industrial property; and two residential properties. The company is based in Tsim Sha Tsui, Hong Kong. Tian Teck Land Limited is a subsidiary of Tian Teck Investment Holding Co., Limited.
